name: X
description: Canonical Home23 skill for X/Twitter work: official API-backed read/search/post/reply when configured, bird-backed timeline/mentions fallback. Use this instead of direct bird CLI for normal posting/replying.
author: home23
compositionHints: For generate-image-then-post workflows, run generate_image first, then call x.post/x.reply with generatedImage:'latest', requireMedia:true, and requireGeneratedImage:true so only the generated artifact can be attached.
